steps.title: Determine cost from each pass type
steps.content: The cost from g ten‑ride passes is $$12.50g$$ dollars. The cost from t single‑ride passes is $$1.50t$$ dollars.

steps.title: Form total cost equation and match answer
steps.content:
Add the two costs and set equal to the monthly budget of $$80$$: $$12.50g + 1.50t = 80$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
